items.claim: Mike Davis is a very skilled fighter.
items.quote: Mike Davis, very, very skilled fighter.

items.claim: Saigid Guseynov really thrives in clinch situations.
items.quote: this is a guy that really thrives in clinch situations.

items.claim: Nicholas Dalby has an incredible gas tank and does not seem to fade in fights.
items.quote: Nicholas Dobby has an incredible gas tank. A guy that just does not seem to fade in fights

items.claim: Saigid Guseynov started to slow down in the back half of the Dalby fight.
items.quote: Syd that back half of that fight he really started to slow down

items.claim: Abu Bakar Vagaev trains with Khamzat Chimaev.
Abu Bakar Vagaev has a very layered game with dynamic spinning attacks in his striking.
items.quote: I see a guy that's got a very layered game where he can kind of do it all in terms of MMA. He's got really really good spinning attacks.

items.claim: Abu Bakar Vagaev has very good takedowns including single legs and crackdowns.
items.quote: And he's got very, very good takedowns as well. I saw a lot of single legs, I saw a lot of head outside singles, a lot of crackdowns.
